_comment: Maps candidate name variants to a single canonical display form. Use only for cases the heuristic in `normalizeCandidateName` cannot resolve (e.g. genuine spelling variants like Kappan vs Kappen, or full-form vs short-form like 'P. C. George Plathottam' vs 'P.C. George'). Capitalization, period placement, and double-letter differences for initials are handled by the heuristic and don't need to be listed. These aliases are critical for cross-cycle candidate continuity tracking — without them, the same individual appearing in 2021 and 2026 under different name forms (or different party labels) is invisible to analyses that match on name.
